response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by hololive 5th Generation. 2. Performed web search for 'Hyper Jumpin' hololive 5th Generation lyrics' to confirm artist, composer (PandaBoY), and retrieve complete lyrics. 3. Mapped the video into chronological scenes including slide information, the vocal performance, and transitional segments. 4. Provided complete original Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 5. Fixed the end time of the last scene to match the video duration (04:56.638).
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the "hololive 5th Generation 'neborabo live Re:VISION' Holoearth Live" event. The video includes informational slides regarding ticket and merchandise details, as well as a full vocal performance of the original song "Hyper Jumpin'" by hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy, and Shishiro Botan). The video content loops segments, repeating information and the musical performance.

scenes.description: Informational slide presenting the methods to participate in the 'neborabo live Re:VISION' event, including details for the Holoearth live venue and online streaming platforms.
Vocal performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by hololive 5th Generation. The performers sing and dance on a stage with a Christmas-themed set.

Hyper jumpin' now

Come on baby, shine
My heart is pounding, pump it up
Hyper jumpin', to the beyond of dreams
More, more
I want more stimulation
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin'
It's better to play around like a child, right?
Tension climbing up from low pressure
Typing @ (mentions) while drunk
Driving the cart on a mission
Keep increasing the speed like this
What's at the place we arrive at?
Run-up with feelings that won't stop
Let's go beyond the dimension
Now
Hyper jumpin', let's jump up
Until I get high and turn to ash
Dancing, shake it up

I want to fly higher
